query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_quotations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN total = 0 OR total IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_zero_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN total > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_positive_total
FROM quotations;
